name: studio.list_forms
description: Enumerate forms on an Actium Studio site. Returns id, name, slug, submission count, and enabled state.
whenToUse: Discovery: an operator asks 'what forms does this site have' before reviewing or editing.
Lead-pipeline flow: identify which forms have collected submissions to prioritize review.
Pre-flight before reading submissions — resolve form_id from a human-readable slug.
whenNotToUse: Caller already knows the form_id — skip listing and read directly via studio.get_form.
Caller wants submission rows — use studio.list_form_submissions; this skill only lists form definitions.
Caller wants to create or edit a form — out of scope for the v1 skill pack; operator-console-only.
